name: Spellfire Spells
description:
When you reach a Sorcerer level specified in the Spellfire Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

Spellfire Spells table:
- Sorcerer Level 3: Cure Wounds, Guiding Bolt, Lesser Restoration, Scorching Ray
- Sorcerer Level 5: Aura of Vitality, Dispel Magic
- Sorcerer Level 7: Fire Shield, Wall of Fire
- Sorcerer Level 9: Greater Restoration, Flame Strike
